title: MYB
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: When Patients Win, Hospitals Lose
items.description: Hospitals and health systems have been operating with a broken business model for decades. It’s time for a moral reckoning on the subject.

items.title: How GLP-1 Weight Loss Drugs Have Revolutionized Obesity- Lessons Learned
items.description: A public health expert explains how GLP-1 drugs have changed the way healthcare providers understand and treat obesity.

items.title: Will LLMs Become Obsolete?
items.description: Description: Experts argue LLMs won’t be the end-state: new architectures (multimodal, agentic, beyond transformers) will supersede them.

items.title: iPhone 18 Pro Tipped For Game-Changing Satellite 5G: No More Dead Zones?
items.description: This year’s iPhones could see a signal boost like no other, with 5G satellite connectivity predicted in the latest report.

items.title: Things that feel risky
items.description: Often aren’t. In fact, they might be the safest way forward.
